description: State document, draft of a report, in Arabic script. Addressed to a lower official whose titles are "al-Rayyis al-Muḥrim al-Amīr ʿImād al-Mulk". Reports an event occurred on the bank of the Nile or the sea (shāṭiʾ l-baḥr). Dating: probably 13th century. Coptic/Greek numerals interspersed between l7, l9 and margin, probably from later reuse for accounts on verso (see different entry).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בCUL & Bodl..
